case_title: LEONID NAKHODIKIN et al VS. DEBRA J DOLCH et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$N/C) SERVED JAN-24-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, NICK

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NAKHODIKIN, LEONID LEVY, FELIX AS TO DEFENDANT DOLCH, DEBRA J LOUIE, KINRY LOUIE, NICK LOWE, WILLIS CHIN, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (4) WERE PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT KEVIN CHIN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANTS DEBRA DOLCH AND KINRY LOUIE WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO KEVIN CHIN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-28-2014 AT 10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAKHODIKIN, LEONID LEVY, FELIX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOLCH, DEBRA J LOUIE, KINRY LOUIE, NICK LOWE, WILLIS AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, KEVIN CHIN, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
